message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.any + Series.all (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.any and Series.all
boolean reductions (skipna=True default):

- any_with_truthy_value, any_all_zeros, any_with_nulls_only
- all_with_truthy_values, all_with_zero_value, all_with_nulls_skipped

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
bool, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts equality. SeriesAny
and SeriesAll were already wired in FixtureOperation and the Bool
response branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-7mvy8]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
